resources.string:
"The purpose of this application is to help people who are interested in understanding Qur'an, explanations and interpretations of rules, surahs and topics about life in Qur'an.
Usage In Main menu are 4 buttons: categories, reading Qur'an in English language, reading Qur'an in Arabic language with latin words, reading Qur'an in Arabic language.
Categories: On this page we show a series of topics that Qur'an talks about, also there's a text field for searching a category. After clicking to the topic that you are interested in it will open a new page where there will be all of ayahs that are talking about that topic. To change the pages you will need only to swipe your finger to the sides.
Reading Qur'an in English language: On this page you can read Qur'an, first you need to choose the surah you are interested, after selecting the surah you will need to choose the ayah number then the application will highlight the selected ayah. To change the pages you will need only to swipe your finger to the sides.
Reading Qur'an in Arabic language with latin words: On this page you can read Qur'an, first you need to choose the surah you are interested, after selecting the surah you will need to choose the ayah number then the application will highlight the selected ayah. To change the pages you will need only to swipe your finger to the sides.
Reading Qur'an in Arabic language: On this page you can read Qur'an, first you need to choose the surah you are interested, after selecting the surah you will need to choose the ayah number then the application will highlight the selected ayah. To change the pages you will need only to swipe your finger to the sides."

"The purpose of this application is to help people who are interested in understanding Qur'an, explanations and interpretations of rules, surahs and topics about life in Qur'an.
In each windows there can be more than one page, so please swipe your finger to check if there are more pages.
Usage In Main menu are 3 buttons: categories, reading Qur'an in English language, reading Qur'an in Arabic language with latin words.
Categories: On this page we show a series of topics that Qur'an talks about, also there's a text field for searching a category. After clicking to the topic that you are interested in it will open a new page where there will be all of ayahs that are talking about that topic. To change the pages you will need only to swipe your finger to the sides.
Reading Qur'an in English language: On this page you can read Qur'an, first you need to choose the surah you are interested, after selecting the surah you will need to choose the ayah number then the application will highlight the selected ayah. To change the pages you will need only to swipe your finger to the sides.
Reading Qur'an in Arabic language with latin words: On this page you can read Qur'an, first you need to choose the surah you are interested, after selecting the surah you will need to choose the ayah number then the application will highlight the selected ayah. To change the pages you will need only to swipe your finger to the sides.
Reading Qur'an in Arabic language: On this page you can read Qur'an, first you need to choose the surah you are interested, after selecting the surah you will need to choose the ayah number then the application will highlight the selected ayah. To change the pages you will need only to swipe your finger to the sides."
In the name of All-llah the most Beneficent the most Merciful
"All translated data are from website "http://qurandatabase.org" We apologize if there are any errors."
"Translated into English from: Muhammad Habib Shakir"
"Translated into German from: Adel Theodor Khoury"
Are you sure you want to exit?
"Special thanks to: Labinot Gashi for translation into German, Arlind Hajredinaj for helping while programming."
Swipe left to go to next page
Swipe right to go to previous page
